framework.name: User Impersonation vs Delegated Authority
framework.description: Currently agents act indistinguishably from users — no 'on-behalf-of' flow where agents prove delegated scope while remaining identifiable as distinct entities. This is the delegation opacity problem from gap_3 stated at the protocol level, not just the mTLS/sidecar level.
framework.raw_quote: User impersonation by agents should be replaced by delegated authority. Currently, agents often act indistinguishably from users, creating accountability gaps and security risks.
